decisions.decision: Executor runtime = SEQUENTIAL on main working tree (no worktree isolation)
decisions.rationale: worktree base-check shouldDegrade=true: origin/HEAD unresolved on branch master (#683)

decisions.decision: Real benchmark base data = /home scan (108,157 paths, 26.5s, 32M DB); /opt was the quick smoke test (421 paths, 0.42s)
decisions.rationale: user chose /opt to gauge speed then /home as the large branchy realistic sample

decisions.decision: Measured churn = 0.0 (3 back-to-back /home snapshots, static tree, dedup 3.00x)
decisions.rationale: truly spaced scans need hours/days; back-to-back gives a real best-case lower bound — note limitation in SUMMARY

decisions.decision: Plan 03 deleted test_grouping.py::test_initialize_database_migrates_v1_rows_idempotently and replaced with schema-agnostic test
decisions.rationale: it asserted v1->current blob-schema migration = backward-compat, forbidden by project policy

decisions.decision: workflow.test_command/build_command are NOT valid config keys in this gsd-tools version
decisions.rationale: post-merge gate falls back to language-sniff (python -m pytest) which fails here (no system python); orchestrator runs the gate manually with `uv run --with pytest pytest`
